def positive_membership_test_against_list_or_tuple_literal_inside_loop():
    rule_id = "membership_test_against_list_or_tuple_literal_inside_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated membership tests against small linear containers in a hot path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
